name: 伯爵府三公子

appearance.face: 油滑或疲态重，贵公子却带不正之气
appearance.distinguishing_features: 一眼可见的不堪与轻浮

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese dissolute nobleman, flashy rich robe, smug expression, decadent aristocratic look
visual_prompt_negative: modern suit, armor, clean scholarly aura, tattoo
scene_presence: 作为陆姝仪婚配威胁被提及

relationships.dynamic: 代表她被迫嫁入火坑的命运
relationships.function: 压迫陆姝仪采取极端手段
